courseRequest.title: Request a new course
courseRequest.description: Fill out the basic course information. We will notify you once an administrator processes your request.

form.title: Course title
form.shortNameTooShort: The short name must be at least 3 characters long.
form.shortNameInvalid: The short name must only contain letters and numbers, without spaces.
form.reasonPlaceholder: Why do you need this course?
form.dateError: The start date must be before the end date.

courseRequest.success: Your course request was submitted successfully. We'll be in touch soon.
courseRequest.error: The course request could not be submitted.

admin.title: Course Requests
admin.subtitle: Review course requests submitted by users and create the course with one click.
admin.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Provide a reason for rejecting the request
admin.acceptSuccess: Course request "{{ title }}" accepted. Course {{ shortName }} created.
admin.shortNameConflictAccept: A course with this short name already exists. Please choose a different short name.
admin.shortNameHint: Must be unique, at least 3 characters, letters and numbers only. Same rules as normal course creation apply.
admin.requesterCoursesHint: The requester is instructor in the following courses. Use this to determine the short name pattern:
admin.noPreviousCourses: The requester is not an instructor of any existing courses.
